headline: Interactive Brokers Grew Its Customer Accounts 34% in a Year. Here's the Bull Case Before Q2 Earnings.
summary: Interactive Brokers' business is much bigger than it was a year ago, hinting at a strong second quarter.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Loom As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
summary: Dow Jones futures: An Iran attack killed two U.S. service members. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also report.

headline: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Stock Could Be 1% Expensive After South Korea Expansion
summary: After a very strong run over the past five years, Interactive Brokers Group now screens as only roughly in line with its intrinsic value on the Excess Returns model, while market multiples lean toward the stock looking expensive. Interactive Brokers Group has returned about 511.7% over five years, which puts extra attention on whether the current price still leaves room for attractive future returns. Recent expansion of global market access, including access to South Korean securities, can...

headline: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Launches Expanded Crypto Access With Stablecoin Transfers
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (NasdaqGS:IBKR) has expanded its cryptocurrency offerings with new token listings. The company has introduced funding and withdrawal via stablecoins, allowing near-instant 24/7 transfers for client accounts. The move advances IBKR's role in digital assets within the broader brokerage and trading platform market. Interactive Brokers Group sits at the crossroads of traditional brokerage services and digital assets, offering access to a wide range of markets on a...
